zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande de Coucy於1225年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，她的父親Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins42歲，母親Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY34歲。她和Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1289年在比利時海瑙特圖爾奈享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande de Coucy于1225年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可时，她的父亲Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins42岁，母亲Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY34岁。她和Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1289年在比利时海瑙特圖爾奈享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande de Coucy was born in 1225, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, was 42 and her mother, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, was 34. She had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne. She died in 1289, in Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande de Coucy est née en 1225, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne. Elle est décédée en 1289, à Tournai, Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande de Coucy 1225 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins 42 und ihre Mutter Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY 34. Sie hatte mit Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1289 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Tournai, Hennegau, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Coucy è nata il nel 1225 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne. Morì nel 1289, nel Tournai, Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolande de Coucyが1225年にフランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Thomas II de Coucy-Vervinsは42歳，母Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRYは34歳であった。彼女はChevalier Arnould de Mortagneとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1289年にベルギーヘイナトトウルナイで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande de Coucy(이)가 1225년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1289년 벨기에 하인오트 토우른아이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Coucy nasceu em 1225, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne. Ela faleceu em 1289, em Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, com 64 anos.

ro.Oost-Souburg, 4388, Nederland: Oost-Souburg, Vlissingen, Zeeland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande de Coucy родилась в 1225 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne. Она умерла в 1289 г. в местности тоурнеи, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande de Coucy nació en 1225, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Chevalier Arnould de Mortagne. Murió en 1289, en Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 64 años.
